title: Quamoclit phoenicea

Quamoclit phoenicea is an annual climber with heart-shaped leaves and vibrant, trumpet-shaped flowers. The plant is a type of flowering vine that can grow quite long and is often used as an ornamental. Quamoclit phoenicea is classified as a species within the genus Quamoclit.
